texto: I don't make friends based on how big their pockets are or how well connected they are
autor: rather I make friends based on how positive their minds are. It is hard to end up with a very complicated lifestyle if you are always surrounded by positive minded individuals.
explicacao: Citação de rather I make friends based on how positive their minds are.
